title: Airport Manager :  Flight Attendant Simulator
description: Get yourself busy and become the city airport manager! Help the passengers in the airport. Maintain the city airport security and manage all the airport passenger related tasks. Help the passengers to board the city airport smoothly. Supervise and assist the city airport staff in maintaining the airport security. Enjoy and do all the city airport manager tasks now. Have fun as more passengers are waiting in the city airport.
